personality_one_liner: An artisanal, warm, and sensory experience that frames traditional Indian pickles like a gourmet culinary magazine.

spacing.rule: Generous magazine-like vertical rhythms. Keep padding comfortable so product photography has breathing room. Avoid dense clusters unless in dashboard views.

do's: Use solid surface backgrounds or soft transparent gradients. Editorial personality relies on whitespace and solid structural colors.
dont's: Do not use blur or glassmorphism. It clashes with the tactile, matte feel of the artisanal editorial direction.

screens.name: Customer - Home

states.empty: Illustration of a traditional clay jar, 'Curating fresh batches soon.'
states.error: Readable text with 'Tap to refresh' primary CTA.

screens.layout: Editorial full-width hero card showcasing top featured pickle with vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse) and Libre Baskerville large title. Followed by generous sections ('Top Sellers', 'New Arrivals') as horizontal scrollable carousels. Cards use surfaceSecondary with sm radius and 0 shadow, relying on imagery and whitespace for structure.

screens.name: Customer - Store Discovery
screens.purpose: List available takeaway locations with timings.

states.empty: Map pin icon. 'No stores open nearby currently.'

screens.layout: List of store cards (address, timings, map snapshot). Each card uses border (1pt) instead of shadow. Action: 'Select Store'. High-contrast typography for timings.

screens.name: Customer - Product Detail
screens.purpose: Sensory deep-dive into the pickle and packaging selection.
screens.layout: Large hero image stretching to top safe area. Content below: Product Name (Serif), Description, Ingredients. Weight selection via pill-shaped chips using surfaceTertiary bg and brandPrimary text for selected state. Sticky primary CTA 'Add to Cart' pinned above home indicator.

screens.name: Customer - Multi-Store Cart & Checkout
screens.purpose: Review items auto-split by store and confirm takeaway.

states.empty: Empty cart icon. 'Your basket is empty.'

screens.layout: Items grouped by Store Name header (Plus Jakarta Sans, bold). Per-store subtotal. Sticky checkout button at the bottom: 'Confirm Takeaway (Pay at Store)'.

screens.name: Seller/Sub-Seller - Dashboard & Orders
screens.purpose: Quick operational view of active orders and daily metrics.
screens.layout: Progressive disclosure layout: Top area shows 2-3 key metrics (Today's Orders, Revenue) in high-contrast card blocks. Below is a scrollable list of active orders with status tags (placed, accepted, ready-date-set). List rows are compact and thumb-friendly.

screens.name: Primary Seller - Manage Sub-Sellers & Products
screens.purpose: Administer team and catalog under the specific store.

states.empty: No sub-sellers added yet. 'Add Sub-seller' button.

screens.layout: Card-based tables for team list. Floating Action Button (brandPrimary) to 'Add New Pickle' or 'Add Sub-seller'. Product list with quick-edit capabilities.

screens.name: Admin - Overview & Curation
screens.purpose: Manage platform-wide stores, primary sellers, and homepage sections.
screens.layout: Grid layout for platform metrics. Section dedicated to 'Homepage Curation' where Admin can drag-and-drop or select pickles to feature in 'Top Sellers' or 'New Arrivals'. List of Stores with 'Add Store' CTA.

hero_featured_pickle.alt: Clear glass jar with Indian artisanal mango pickle on wooden table

hero_spices_background.alt: Table topped with assorted traditional Indian spices

empty_state_illustration.alt: Rustic wooden chopping board with traditional spices

instructions_to_main_agent: Design the app with a refined 'Editorial Mobile LIGHT' personality (No Dark Mode needed for an artisanal e-commerce).
Enforce strict typographic hierarchy: use Libre Baskerville strictly for display/hero headings, and Plus Jakarta Sans for UI elements, labels, and descriptions.
Implement the Multi-role logic natively. Each role (Admin, Primary Seller, Sub-seller, Customer) gets a distinct Tab navigation layout.
Zero Glassmorphism: This brand requires a tactile, matte feel. Rely on solid surface colors, generous spacing, and fine 1pt borders for elevation (shadow_tier: 0).
Enforce a 3-stop vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse) on all text-over-image scenarios, such as the Customer Home hero card.
Order Management: Sub-sellers and Sellers view the 5 order statuses using high-contrast, thumb-friendly list rows (card-based table layout) for fast operational scanning.
Absolutely NO purples, blues, or indigos anywhere. The palette is strictly terracotta, ochre, bone-white, and warm greys.
